data.name: IDS_NOFREESPACE_TEXT
data.value: Your system storage doesn't have enough free space to create a game save.

data.name: IDS_PRO_RETURNEDTOTITLESCREEN_TEXT
data.value: You have been returned to the title screen because you have signed out of the "PSN"

data.name: IDS_PRO_RETURNEDTOMENU_TEXT
data.value: The match has ended because you have signed out of the "PSN"

data.name: IDS_PRO_NOTONLINE_TITLE
data.value: You are not currently signed in.

data.name: IDS_PRO_NOTONLINE_TEXT
data.value: This game has some features which require being signed in to the "PSN", but you are currently offline.

data.name: IDS_PRO_XBOXLIVE_NOTIFICATION
data.value: This feature requires being signed in to the "PSN".

data.name: IDS_PRO_ACHIEVEMENTPROBLEM_TEXT
data.value: There was a problem accessing your Sony Entertainment Network account. Your trophy could not be awarded at this time.

data.name: IDS_PRO_NOPROFILEOPTIONS_TEXT
data.value: Saving of settings to your Sony Entertainment Network account has failed.

data.name: IDS_PRO_UNLOCKGAME_TEXT
data.value: This is the Minecraft: PlayStation®3 Edition trial game. If you had the full game, you would just have earned a trophy! Unlock the full game to experience the joy of Minecraft: PlayStation®3 Edition and to play with your friends across the globe through the "PSN". Would you like to unlock the full game?
